description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines two stages, test and build. In the test stage add a test-a2x job that runs `docker container run --rm -v $(pwd):/workdir somatorio/a2x --fop --dry-run cv.txt`. Also in the test stage add a test-spellcheck job that sets CORRETOR_ERROS by running `docker container run --rm -v $(pwd):/workdir somatorio/hunspell -l -d pt_BR,en_US -p .whitelist.dic infos/*.txt | sort | uniq`, then echoes the variable and asserts it is empty with `test "$CORRETOR_ERROS" == ""`. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker container run --rm -v $(pwd):/workdir somatorio/a2x --fop cv.txt` and publishes the generated cv.pdf as a build artifact.
